description: You are a GIS Engineer building a parameterized spatial analysis service on GeoServer (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/web/, admin / Admin123!). Create workspace `spatial_analytics` (URI: http://spatial.analytics.example.org) with a PostGIS store `city_demographics` (host: gs-postgis, port: 5432, db: gis, user: geoserver, pass: geoserver123). Create a SQL view layer `continental_city_stats` that spatially joins `ne_countries` (alias `c`) and `ne_populated_places` (alias `p`) using `ST_Contains(c.geom, p.geom)` with a LEFT JOIN. GROUP BY country to compute: `c.name AS country_name`, `c.adm0_a3 AS iso_code`, `c.continent`, `COUNT(p.gid) AS city_count`, `COALESCE(SUM(p.pop_max),0) AS total_urban_pop`, `c.geom AS geom`. Filter with `WHERE c.continent = '%target_continent%'` using a view parameter `target_continent` (default: Europe, regex: `^[a-zA-Z ]+$`). Declare geometry column `geom` as MultiPolygon, SRID 4326; compute bounding box from data. Create SLD style `urban_density_gradient` with five rules on `city_count`: 0 -> fill #D3D3D3, 1-2 -> #AEC7E8, 3-5 -> #2CA02C, 6-10 -> #FF7F0E, 11+ -> #D62728 (all with #333333 stroke). Set as default style for the layer. Generate two WMS GetMap PNGs (800x400, EPSG:4326, bbox -180,-90,180,90) using `viewparams=target_continent:Europe` and `viewparams=target_continent:Asia`, saved to `/home/ga/output/europe_density.png` and `/home/ga/output/asia_density.png`.
